retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds; no failure path to retry.
contract_summary: This function releases a reference on a cache_coherency_ops_inst object via kref_put. It decrements the reference count and, if it reaches zero, calls the release function to free the object. After calling this function, the caller must not access the object any further, as it may have been freed. This is the standard put operation in kref-based reference counting.
